message:
extensions: session hostcall ops + policy cache fix for anonymous extensions

Session hostcall additions:
- get_file: returns sessionFile/session_file from state
- get_name: returns sessionName/session_name from state
- append_message: parses and appends a SessionMessage to the session

Policy cache fix:
- resolve_js_hostcall_policy_decision now takes Option<&str> for extension_id
- Anonymous hostcalls (extension_id=None) are prompted but NOT cached
- Named extensions continue to use the prompt cache as before
- Prevents cache pollution from temporary/anonymous extensions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
